case_title: XIOMARA CASTRO VS. SEBASTIAN ALEXANDER RIVERA

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: RESET OF TRIAL DATE FOR NON-SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF CASTRO, XIOMARA
TRIAL RESET TO OCT-13-2016 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF SEP-15-2016 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-13-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-13-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF XIOMARA CASTRO. PLAINTIFF ASSISTED BY SPANISH INTERPRETER KARINA MCMILLAN-REA. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE DONALD S. MITCHELL, CLERK S. LE, NOT REPORTED (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-13-2016 - JUDGMENT. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. LE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CASTRO, XIOMARA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RIVERA, SEBASTIAN ALEXANDER $2,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $400.00 INTEREST, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,450.00, (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT) STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
